title: mypy: 6 no-any-return errors (returning Any from typed functions)
description:
6 no-any-return errors:
- src/lichen/announce/coords.py:162 - returning Any as int|None
- src/lichen/interface/tcp.py:45,162 - returning Any as tuple[str,int]|None
- src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:318 - from_bytes returning Any
- src/lichen/loadng/messages.py:173 - from_bytes returning Any
- src/lichen/sim/renode_server.py:109 - returning Any as int

Fix: Add explicit type annotations or casts to the return values.
